scope: Second-pass sweep for SF Bay Area founding product design and first design hire roles at AI-native or AI-core startups.
methodology: Checked YC live role pages, Ashby direct posting pages, official company role pages, LinkedIn-indexed roles, Wellfound/indexed job pages, and aggregator leads.
Accepted only specific live role URLs with HTTP 200 and clear founding product design or first design hire signal.
Excluded indexed roles when the official ATS returned posting:null, direct role URL returned 404, or only an aggregator source existed.
